name: LAARA: Layer-Aware Adaptive Rank Allocation for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
summary: arXiv:2607.19391v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation is widely used for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, yet existing methods typically assign the same adapter rank to every transf...
description: arXiv:2607.19391v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation is widely used for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, yet existing methods typically assign the same adapter rank to every transformer layer despite their heterogeneous adaptation requirements. In this work, we show theoretically and empirically that uniform rank allocation is fundamentally suboptimal. Motivated by this observa...
author: Ashutosh Tripathi, Surya Deep Singh, Pranab Sahoo, Sriparna Saha
